recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Giant Octopus
recommendations.overview: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures as they battle each other for supremacy of the sea.

recommendations.title: Altered
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years ago, five men were abducted by aliens. Only four returned. Now, these same four men have managed to capture one of the creatures who killed their friend and ruined their lives.

recommendations.title: Far from the Tree
recommendations.overview: On an idyllic beach in the Pacific Northwest, curiosity gets the better of a young raccoon whose frustrated parent attempts to keep them both safe.

recommendations.title: Assimilate
recommendations.overview: Three friends making a web series about their town discover that their neighbors are being killed and replaced by creatures who are perfect copies of their victims.

recommendations.title: Alligator 2: The Mutation
recommendations.overview: A giant mutated alligator runs riot in a small town after the sewer system washes it into a lake.

recommendations.title: Captain Fantastic
recommendations.overview: Deep in the forests of the Pacific Northwest, a father devoted to raising his six kids with a rigorous physical and intellectual education is forced to leave his paradise and enter the world, beginning a journey that challenges his idea of what it me

recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
recommendations.overview: As New York City is invaded by alien creatures who hunt by sound, a woman named Sam fights to survive with her cat.

recommendations.title: Deep Rising
recommendations.overview: A group of heavily armed hijackers board a luxury ocean liner in the South Pacific Ocean to loot it, only to do battle with a series of large-sized, tentacled, man-eating sea creatures who have taken over the ship first.

recommendations.title: Big Legend
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier ventures into the Pacific Northwest to uncover the truth behind his fiance's disappearance.
